title: Nexus: The Secure Agentic Sandbox
subtitle: A virtualized safe environment for agentic operators to work without degrading security posture.
abstract: The operating environment built by the Government of Alberta that allows a virtualized safe environment for agentic operators to work without degrading our security posture. A secure sandbox where agents can be iterative, make mistakes, try different things, install architectures, and where the parallel-model competition described in Paper 7 actually runs.

slides.text: The operating environment built by the Government of Alberta that allows a virtualized safe environment for agentic operators to work without degrading our security posture. A secure sandbox where agents can be iterative, make mistakes, try different things, install architectures, and where the parallel-model competition described in Paper 7 actually runs.

slides.title: How the paper is laid out
slides.caption: Sections
slides.text: A plan in 4 sections. Why a sandbox is needed. How Nexus isolates agents. Iteration, mistakes, recovery. Parallel-model competition in practice.
